_rotation_note: The daily job picks the next business each morning - rotating among ward businesses with priority to spotlight requests from owners and newly opened spots. Keep yesterday's entries in history.

current.name: Monteverde Restaurant & Pastificio
current.blurb: Chef Sarah Grueneberg, a James Beard Award winner for Best Chef: Great Lakes, turns out some of the country's most celebrated handmade pasta from an open pastificio counter on Madison Street. The cacio whey pepe and ragu alla napoletana are neighborhood legends, and the bar pours a deep Italian wine list. Reservations go fast, but the pasta bar seats are held for walk-ins.
